chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1340 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 20-10-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned Additional A.G objected to this petition on the ground that the Disability Certificate produced by the petitioner has not been issued by the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. After such, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will first approach the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, for obtaining a fresh Disability Certificate and thereafter will approach the concerned respondents for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
